column3: What do you think time is?
Teehee. Don't hurt yourself coming up with an answer.
...Hehe. It was an odd question. No wonder you don't have a reply.
I just think about it sometimes when I study recently.
The geometry of space-time, the second law of thermodynamics...
But the past is the past. Memory is memory. Don't you agree?
Sorry, this must be a little complicated for you...
Do you have memories you want to forget too?
Since you've lost all your memories.
Or were you lying? Are you actually hiding something from me?
I guess there was no point in asking you that.
Since you have amnesia, you don't have memories you could want to forget.
For some reason, I'm a bit envious...
Sometimes, a thought comes to me.
You know how you delete messages on your phone with a button...
I wish I could get rid of my own memories as easily as that.
Maybe I could be reborn as something else then.
I'll keep that in mind. Since you've experienced amnesia yourself and all.
It's an old memory. Back then, adults all seemed so captivating to me...
It's a bittersweet memory of love... Heh. But that person's no longer here.
With a yummy-looking figure like that, what else could've happened?
Teehee. No, I think I'll keep this memory.
If I lose it, that person will really be gone...
Let's call it a day. Rin, you should get some sleep too.
